programs.title: Sarah Beeny's New Country Lives
programs.desc: Gary and Annette make plans to split their old Somerset vicarage in two, so they can rent out one half and live in the other.

programs.title: Escape to Florida
programs.desc: In Orlando, the Best of British pub adds afternoon tea to the menu, but can scones survive the 40-degree heat? Denise is selling her cherished home. Donna prepares for a big break.

programs.title: Sun, Sea and Selling Houses
programs.desc: In Almería, the Garners help friends Lynn and Della balance a modern bolthole with a community feel. Charlotte Rodriguez treats Barry and Mandy to Alicante's sun-soaked options.

programs.title: A Place in the Sun
programs.desc: Paul and Debbie want a holiday home on the beautiful island of Fuerteventura where they can spend quality time together. Ben Hillman shows them what their £115k can buy in Caleta de Fuste.
